ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., BSSP2430 - 24 x 30" Corrugated Sheet) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product (e.g., Kraft) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material type of the product (e.g., C-Flute, BC-Flute) */,
  "qty_bale" INTEGER /* Quantity of products per bale */,
  "qty_bundle" INTEGER /* Quantity of bales per bundle */,
  "sqft" REAL /* Total square footage of the product */,
  "units_skid" INTEGER /* Number of units per skid */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 24 x 30") */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in pounds */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product per unit */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "image" TEXT /* Product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "current_qty_bale" INTEGER /* Current quantity of products in bales */,
  "current_qty_bundle" INTEGER /* Current quantity of bales in bundles */,
  "current_sqft" REAL /* Current total square footage of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "warehouse_address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_contact" TEXT /* Contact person's name and phone number for the warehouse */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., in-stock, out-of-stock, backordered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_space_available" INTEGER /* Available space in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the customer represents */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., retail, wholesale, corporate) */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer was added to the system */,
  "total_purchases" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "order_status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the order status */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method chosen by the customer */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the order */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the product */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Sales, Inventory, Finance) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
